name: Mesh Desk Organizer Black - Brightroom™: Steel Office Supplies & Desk Drawer Organizers, 8"x8"x4.5"
description:
It's easy to keep all of your notebooks, planners, stationery and other office supplies neatly sorted with this Mesh Desk Organizer from Brightroom™. Crafted from steel mesh for a lightweight, durable frame, this organizer includes four pieces in different sizes to hold different types of items. The pieces can be stacked atop each other to save space on your desktop or separated and placed inside drawers, giving you different options for keeping your workspace organized. Great for both at-home and office workers, this organizer's black finish pairs easily with any existing decor color scheme.

Dimensions for each :
Largest Bin is 8*8in
Medium 4*8in
Smallest 4*4in
Height for all is 2.25in.


Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
